title: Sailor Moon - Un Nouveau Voyage
overview: Sailor Moon: Un Nouveau Voyage is set to be the final performances for the casted 5 Sailor Senshi, as this follows the storyline of the Infinity Arc. It is also the Nakayoshi 60th Anniversary concert.  Performance Dates:  September 18-27, at the Tokyo AiiA 2.5 Theater  October 2-4, at the Senkei Hall Breeze Theater in Osaka

title: Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon a Time
overview: In the aftermath of the Fourth Impact, stranded without their Evangelions, Shinji, Asuka and Rei find refuge in one of the rare pockets of humanity that still exist on the ruined planet Earth. There, each lives a life far different from their days as an Evangelion pilot. However, the danger to the world is far from over. A new impact is looming on the horizon—one that will prove to be the true end of Evangelion.

title: The Fisherman's Wife
overview: In a small fishing village in northern Kanto, Nami stands at the edge of the dock, waiting for her husband’s boat to return. While waiting, Nami lives with her father-in-law, Gengoro, who uses her nightly as he pleases. One day, a man named Kaneda washes up at the port, in hiding after committing a heinous sex crime, and begins to work for a fisherman named Kunio. While Kaneda is doing his best to reform his life, all hell breaks loose when he crosses paths with Nami, and his natural urges kick back in.

title: Mitchaku kyonyû shimai: Oppai wa shitte iru
overview: Saya is in love with her late sister Yoko's fiance, Masayuki. Yoko appears as an imaginary friend and encourages her, but she is unable to express her feelings to Masayuki. Masayuki begins dating a new lover, but...

title: Hoshimachi Suisei Nippon Budokan Live "SuperNova"
overview: Suisei will hold her solo concert at Japan’s prestigious Nippon Budokan on February 1, 2025, fulfilling her dream as an idol from her debut.

title: Kokuho
overview: Nagasaki, 1964: Following the death of his yakuza father, 15-year-old Kikuo is taken under the wing of a famous kabuki actor. Alongside Shunsuke, the actor’s only son, he decides to dedicate himself to this traditional form of theatre. For decades, the two young men grow and evolve together – and one will become the greatest Japanese master of the art of kabuki.

title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba Infinity Castle
overview: The Demon Slayer Corps are drawn into the Infinity Castle, where Tanjiro, Nezuko, and the Hashira face terrifying Upper Rank demons in a desperate fight as the final battle against Muzan Kibutsuji begins.

title: Odekake Kozame Movie
overview: Movie based on the Odekake Kozame manga and sequel to the 2023 anime that follows the nostalgic everyday adventures of a young shark.

title: ≠ME THE MOVIE: Yakusoku no Uta
overview: ≠ME is finally coming to the big screen! In their first-ever live and documentary film, their journey toward their dreams is etched into history.

title: Exit 8
overview: A man trapped in an endless sterile subway passageway sets out to find Exit 8. The rules of his quest are simple: do not overlook anything out of the ordinary. If you discover an anomaly, turn back immediately. If you don’t, carry on. Then leave from Exit 8. But even a single oversight will send him back to the beginning. Will he ever reach his goal and escape this infinite corridor?

title: Cow
overview: A close-up portrait of the daily lives of a pair of cows: told by way of some narrative-free, intimate POV photography, with plenty of close shot images, we follow the daily routine of these animals as they live what can only be described as mundane, boring lives - all with an ultimate purpose within the human food chain.

title: One Battle After Another
overview: Washed-up revolutionary Bob exists in a state of stoned paranoia, surviving off-grid with his spirited, self-reliant daughter, Willa. When his evil nemesis resurfaces after 16 years and she goes missing, the former radical scrambles to find her, father and daughter both battling the consequences of his past.

title: TRON: Ares
overview: A highly sophisticated Program called Ares is sent from the digital world into the real world on a dangerous mission, marking humankind's first encounter with A.I. beings.

title: Tokyo Taxi
overview: One day, taxi driver Koji Usami is tasked with driving 85-year-old Sumire Takano from Shibamata, Tokyo to a senior care facility in Hayama, Kanagawa. Sumire asks Koji to make some detours. Gradually opening up to her, Sumire begins to tell the story of her grand past...

title: Nissy Entertainment "Re:10th Anniversary Final" BEST DOME TOUR
overview: The first solo artist ever to perform a second nationwide 6-major-dome tour! this entertainment experience is a one-of-a-kind performance that blends live music, movies, shows, comedy, and amusement park elements, transcending the boundaries of a traditional live concert.

title: NJPW Road to The New Beginning 2026 - Day 5
overview: The fifth night of Road to The New Beginning 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on February 1, 2026, at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan.

title: Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling in Osaka ~Acceleration~
overview: Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling in Osaka ~Acceleration~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling, held on February 1, 2026, at Azalea Taisho Hall in Osaka, Japan.

title: LUCA
overview: A certain girl Nene encounters asks her this question.

title: NJPW Road to The New Beginning 2026 - Day 6
overview: The sixth night of Road to The New Beginning 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on February 2, 2026, at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan.

title: Even If This Love Disappears Tonight
overview: A high school girl wakes up each day with no memory of yesterday. When she agrees to date a shy classmate, can their love grow with every new beginning?

title: NJPW Road to The New Beginning 2026 - Day 7
overview: The seventh night of Road to The New Beginning 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on February 3, 2026, at Iwaki City Gymnasium in Iwaki, Fukushima, Japan.

title: The Muppet Show
overview: Music, comedy, and a whole lot of chaos is bound to ensue when The Muppets once again take the stage of the original Muppet Theatre with their very special guest, Sabrina Carpenter!

title: CONNECT: Road to Conquest 15
overview: The Wakamatsu-gumi and Munakata-gumi successfully rescue Shuhei and wipe out the Jojima-gumi. Shuhei is set to become wakagashira and lead both the Wakamatsu-gumi and the Aizu Federation. A strong bond forms between Sawamura and Shuhei after they promise to each lead their own families. Meanwhile, Soma meets his sister’s fiancé, detective Shigefumi Yanagita.

title: NJPW Road to The New Beginning 2026 - Day 8
overview: The eighth night of Road to The New Beginning 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on February 4, 2026, at Toyota Crown Arena in Fukushima, Japan.

title: CONNECT: Road to Conquest 14
overview: Within the Aizu Federation in Fukushima, tensions escalate between the Wakamatsu-gumi and the Jojima-gumi. Gravely ill Wakamatsu boss Heigo Otake seeks help from the Toyo-kai. Aiming to gain a foothold in Tohoku, the Toyo-kai entrusts protection of Otake’s son Shuhei to the Munakata-gumi. Ryuichi Sawamura and Kunihito Soma find Shuhei after he escapes an attack by the Jojima-gumi.

title: THE RAMPAGE Live Tour 2025 PRIMAL SPIDER
overview: THE RAMPAGE's live tour final in 2025 from Osaka.

title: Balhae Blurred in Rain
overview: Based on the life of Dae Inseon, the last king of Balhae.

title: Together
overview: Years into their relationship, Tim and Millie find themselves at a crossroads as they move to the country, abandoning all that is familiar in their lives except each other. With tensions already flaring, a nightmarish encounter with a mysterious, unnatural force threatens to corrupt their lives, their love, and their flesh.

title: Queen of Chess
overview: A Hungarian girl dreams of conquering international men’s chess. After a 15-year battle against world champion Garry Kasparov and her domineering father, Judit Polgár revolutionizes the sport’s patriarchal culture to become one of the greatest chess prodigies in history and the greatest woman chess player of all time.

title: Yoh! Bestie
overview: Thando is perpetually unlucky in love, but when her bestie returns from his travels with a fiancée in tow, she's forced to face a new emotion — jealousy.

title: Hodonaku, Owakare Desu
overview: After failing to land a job, Shimizu Misora stumbles into an internship at funeral company Bando Kaikan and trains under the strict but compassionate Urushibara Reiji. As she learns to care for the bereaved, her discouragement turns into admiration, and a new sense of purpose.

title: Milky☆Subway: The Galactic Limited Express Movie: Kakueki Teisha Gekijou Iki
overview: Theatrical compilation of Milky☆Subway: The Galactic Limited Express with new scenes added.

title: Mag Mag
overview: The revenge story of a woman whose partner is murdered by a ghost, and who will soon discover the true identity of the one she must avenge.

title: The Height of the Coconut Trees
overview: Just before their honeymoon, Sugamoto and Aoki break up. Sugamoto decides to bury her lost emotion by going on the determined honeymoon trip alone. The journey's end is a remote town famous for being a suicide hotspot, a place where the spirits of those who took their own lives roam around without finding a way to the afterlife. In this chaotic space where humans and ghosts meet, traces of the past abound, but maybe all these give them the strength to start a new chapter in life.

title: The Shrine
overview: Yu-mi and her friends are staying in a small Japanese town. When Hee-jung doesn't return home for dinner, they decide to visit the shrine from her painting. Strange occurrences startle them as they explore the shrine, even some end up injuring themselves. Yu-mi senses a sinister presence lurking within. She knows the right person for this, her old shaman friend named Myung-jin. Leaving the past behind with Yu-mi, he joins Pastor Han-ju, a spiritual leader of the town. Their mysterious cooperation to keep everyone safe is about to begin.

title: Nikki hako no koi
overview: After her grandfather, who ran an antiques shop, passes away, Nanami decides to take over the business. As she prepares to reopen the shop, she buys a small box from a friend who runs a recycle shop. Inside is a diary in which a woman candidly describes her relationship with her partner... (R15+ version premiered at the OP PICTURES+ Festival 2025).

title: FUKUYAMA MASAHARU LIVE FILM@NAGASAKI　月光 ずっとこの光につながっていたんだ
The Panda Adventure
overview: Movie recap version of the 2024 documentary series on panda.

title: Someone was often singing in the fields
Killer of Sheep
overview: An African-American man working at a slaughterhouse in the Watts area of Los Angeles leads a dissatisfied and listless existence.

title: NJPW Road to The New Beginning 2026 - Day 9
overview: The ninth night of Road to The New Beginning 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on February 7, 2026, at Habikino City Sports Center in Habikino, Osaka, Japan.

title: Touken Ranbu the Stage Guden Mujun Genjimonogatari Revival
overview: Rerun of the Touken Ranbu Guden stageplay from 2023.

title: Stardom 15th Anniversary Supreme Fight 2026 in Osaka
overview: Supreme Fight 2026 in Osaka was a professional wrestling event produced by World Wonder Ring Stardom that took place on February 7, 2026, at EDION Arena Osaka in Osaka, Japan. The show was headlined by Saya Kamitani (c) vs. Starlight Kid for the World of Stardom Championship.

title: NJPW Road to The New Beginning 2026 - Day 10
overview: The tenth and final night of Road to The New Beginning 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on February 8, 2026, at EDION Arena Osaka #2 in Osaka, Japan.

title: Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling in Shinjuku FACE ~Acceleration~
overview: Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling in Shinjuku FACE ~Acceleration~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling, held on February 8, 2026, at Shinjuku FACE in Tokyo, Japan.

title: OZ Academy OZ30th & OZAKI40th "Sakimidareru Wa Hokori"
overview: OZ Academy OZ30th & OZAKI40th was a show put on by Oz Academy on 2.8.26 to celebrate the 30th anniversary of Oz Academy and 40th anniversary of Ozaki the founder of Oz Academy it was main evented by Saori Anou vs. Hiroyo Matsumoto for the Oz Academy Openweight chmpionship

title: Yakuza Powered by Nihon Touitsu
overview: The first installment in the Yakuza/Like a Dragon franchise, which has shipped over 30 million copies worldwide, has been adapted into a live action work that remains almost faithful to the original. Produced by the cast and staff of the hugely popular franchise Unification of Japan, which depicts the Japanese underworld, the adaptation is fully supervised by Ryu Ga Gotoku Studio. The story follows the events leading up to the video game Yakuza Kiwami 3 & Dark Ties.

title: State of Fear
overview: As São Paulo erupts in an unprecedented wave of violence, a lawyer with underworld ties must strike a deal with the police to rescue her kidnapped niece.

title: FULLMETAL ALCHEMIST THE STAGE –Ambitions of Darkness and Light–
overview: Third stage play in the Fullmetal Alchemist Stage series, focusing on the Briggs arc.

title: TJPW Shoko Quest IV: Those Guided by the Snow Country
overview: Shoko Quest IV: Those Guided by the Snow Country was a professional wrestling event promoted by Tokyo Joshi Pro-Wrestling (TJPW). It was held on February 11, 2026 at Duo CEREZO in Joetsu, Niigata, Japan.

title: NJPW The New Beginning In Osaka 2026
overview: The New Beginning in Osaka 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on February 11, 2026, at EDION Arena Osaka in Osaka, Japan, and was headlined by Yota Tsuji (c) vs. Jake Lee for the IWGP World Heavyweight Championship.

title: Crime 101
overview: When an elusive thief whose high-stakes heists unfold along the iconic 101 freeway in Los Angeles eyes the score of a lifetime, with hopes of this being his final job, his path collides with a disillusioned insurance broker who is facing her own crossroads. Determined to crack the case, a relentless detective closes in on the operation, raising the stakes even higher.

title: Eternity
overview: In an afterlife where souls have one week to decide where to spend eternity, Joan is faced with the impossible choice between the man she spent her life with and her first love, who died young and has waited decades for her to arrive.

title: Bugonia
overview: Two conspiracy obsessed young men kidnap the high-powered CEO of a major company, convinced that she is an alien intent on destroying planet Earth.

title: Alienoid
overview: Gurus in the late Goryeo dynasty try to obtain a fabled, holy sword, and humans in 2022 hunt down an alien prisoner that is locked in a human's body. The two parties cross paths when a time-traveling portal opens up.

title: Spermageddon
overview: Two narrative threads: one is an emerging love story between awkward teens Jens and Lisa, who are having sex for the first time; the other, an eventful quest of Simon the Semen and his friends to reach the golden goal, the Egg.

title: Animal
overview: The hardened son of a powerful industrialist returns home after years abroad and vows to take bloody revenge on those threatening his father's life.

title: The Singers
overview: An impromptu singing contest at a dive bar turns a lonely night into a soul-baring moment of shared harmony.

title: Joe's College Road Trip
overview: To teach his sheltered grandson about the real world, Madea's foul-mouthed brother Joe takes the college-bound teen on a raucous cross-country road trip.

title: The Dangers in My Heart: The Movie
overview: A re-edit of both anime seasons featuring newly added footage and will depict the story of Ichikawa and Yamada after the events of the TV series.

title: Gintama: Yoshiwara in Flames
overview: Upon meeting a young boy named Haruta who makes a living as a pickpocket, Gintoki discovers that he is pickpocketing out of a desire to meet his long-lost mother, Hiwa, Yoshiwara's number one courtesan. Gintoki and his friends venture to Yoshiwara to fulfill Haruta's wish, but standing in their way is Housen, the Night King who rules Yoshiwara.

title: Love Punch!
overview: Madoka Kamei, the top delinquent at Kōō High, is stuck in a rut—failing school, and out of the game when it comes to both love and fights. That changes when his rival, Mitsuru Satō from Shiraiwa High, suddenly appears—not to brawl, but to announce he’s moving into the apartment above Madoka’s grandma’s candy shop.  The unexpected closeness between the two stirs up chaos. Madoka tries to bridge the gap with his usual big-brother charm, but Mitsuru’s true intentions remain a mystery…

title: Angel Flight THE MOVIE
overview: The hit series about final goodbyes between the dead and the living across borders comes to the big screen. Angel Hearse receives a wave of international repatriation requests: a couple in Mexico in a movie-like romance, a baby, a man in a wheelchair on a world journey, an American star and his secret love, and Nami, who heads to Mexico after news her lover is alive. Will miracle reunions await?

title: Marigold New Years Golden Garden 2026 ~ Day 9
overview: Marigold New Years Golden Garden 2026 ~ Day 9 was a professional wrestling event promoted by Dream Star★Fighting Marigold. It took place on February 13, 2026 at Shinjuku FACE in Tokyo, Japan.

title: Stardom Nighter in Korakuen 2026 Feb.
overview: Stardom Nighter in Korakuen 2026 Feb. was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on February 13, 2026 at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan.

title: Marvelous Mio 10th Anniversary
overview: Mio 10th Anniversary was a professional wrestling event promoted by Marvelous That's Women Pro Wrestling, commemorating the tenth anniversary of company star Mio Momono's in-ring debut. It took place on February 13, 2026, at Shin-Kiba 1st RING in Tokyo, Japan.

title: In Our Day
overview: Recently returned to South Korea, an actress in her forties is staying with her friend and her cat. Meanwhile, an aging poet in declining health lives alone after the death of his own cat. One day, each receives a visit from a different young aspiring artist, who come equipped with questions about their careers and life itself.

title: Heatwave Over Flowers 5 ~The Only Sauna in the World~
overview: Heatwave Over Flowers 5 ~The Only Sauna in the World~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by DDT Pro-Wrestling (DDT), primarily focused on the stable The37KAMIINA. It took place on February 14, 2026, at Shinjuku FACE in Tokyo, Japan.

title: Super Space Sheriff Gavan Infinity: Jo-Chaku Course
overview: Use the Gavarion Trigger to Jo-Chaku! You too can master "Jo-Chaku"! Be sure to check out Gavan Infinity's battle too!

title: Stardom in Fuji 2026 Feb.
overview: Stardom in Fuji 2026 Feb. was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on February 15, 2026, at Fujisan Messe in Fuji, Shizuoka, Japan.

title: DDT Rembrandt Highway Series 2026 ~Ayu Coliseum in Atsugi~
overview: Rembrandt Highway Series 2026 ~Ayu Coliseum in Atsugi~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by DDT Pro-Wrestling (DDT). It took place on February 15, 2026, at Rembrandt Hotel Atsugi Grand Banquet Sagami in Atsugi, Kanagawa, Japan.

title: Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling in Sendai PIT ~Acceleration~
overview: Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling in Sendai PIT ~Acceleration~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by Sendai Girls' Pro-Wrestling, held on February 15, 2026, at Sendai PIT in Sendai, Miyagi, Japan.

title: TJPW club eX: Chapter Pause
overview: TJPW club eX: Chapter Pause was a professional wrestling event promoted by Tokyo Joshi Pro-Wrestling (TJPW). It was held on February 15, 2026 at Shinagawa Prince Hotel Club eX in Tokyo, Japan.

title: Cameron Winter Live from Christ Shinagawa Church (Tokyo, Japan)
NJPW Presents CMLL Fantastica Mania 2026 - Day 1
overview: The first night of Fantastica Mania 2026 was a professional wrestling event co-produced by Japanese promotion New Japan Pro Wrestling (NJPW) and Mexican promotion Consejo Mundial De Lucha Libre (CMLL) that took place on February 18, 2026 at Yoyogi National Gymnasium #2 in Tokyo, Japan.

title: The Swedish Connection
overview: Swedish Foreign Ministry bureaucrat Gösta Engzell, overlooked during WWII, rescued thousands while turning supposedly neutral Sweden into a moral force. His efforts challenged the status quo and left a lasting humanitarian legacy.

title: Man on the Run
overview: Paul McCartney forms new band Wings after Beatles breakup. Archival home footage shows his life with Linda, who influenced his music. The film follows Wings from formation through the 1970s, during which McCartney wrote hit songs.

title: Meet, Greet & Bye
overview: A mother, who loves watching K-dramas, decides to stop her chemo treatment after losing hope of getting better. Her only dream before dying is to meet her ultimate K-drama idol, who is visiting Manila for a series of events. Her four children agree to work together with the condition that once their mother meets their idol, she will undergo therapy before her time runs out.

title: Primate
overview: Lucy, a college student, along with her friends, spend their vacation at her family's home in Hawaii, which includes her pet chimpanzee, Ben. However, when Ben contracts rabies after being bitten by a rabid animal, the group must fight for their lives in order to avoid the now-violent chimp.

title: Cosmic Princess Kaguya!
overview: Iroha's life gets knocked off its orbit when Kaguya, a carefree runaway from the Moon, moves in and convinces her to perform in a virtual world together.

title: Firebreak
overview: Little Lide disappears in the forest while her family packs up their home. As a fire breaks out, her mother must race to reach her before the flames do.

title: Sentimental Value
overview: Sisters Nora and Agnes reunite with their estranged father, the charismatic Gustav, a once-renowned director who offers stage actress Nora a role in what he hopes will be his comeback film. When Nora turns it down, she soon discovers he has given her part to an eager young Hollywood star.

title: Pavane
overview: Three lonely strangers meet at their department store jobs and find solace in each other's company while they explore connection and the nature of love.

title: Kyojo Reunion
overview: Kyojo is a school that trains future police officers. In its closed room, where unqualified students are weeded out, students with dreams, hopes, and secrets face off against the strict instructor, Kimichi Kazama, who can see through even the smallest lies. This is the first of a two-part film adaptation of the TV drama series "Kyojo."

title: Sai: Disaster
overview: Four people lead ordinary lives in different places, their paths never crossing. A mysterious man appears in each story, always as someone else. One moment, a cram school instructor; the next, a truck driver, a barber - his identity constantly shifting. Then, death strikes. A detective pursues the truth, closing in on a revelation...

title: Mōsō fanfare
overview: After graduating from high school, reclusive Matsuri spends her days fantasizing, venting her sexual desires. Her father, Toshiaki, and mother, Reiko, worry about their daughter, but enjoy their lovey-dovey days. Every time Matsuri sees her parents enjoying their harmonious life, her delusions intensify. One day, Hiroki, who happens to be passing by, picks up her laundry. The two become close, and Matsuri begins to develop feelings for him. Her world of delusions continues to expand. (R15+ version premiered at the OP PICTURES+ 2025).

title: The Convenience Store
overview: Tazuru is a college student working the night shift alone in a convenience store. The manager of the store, who has been missing for days, is found dead in the basement, with his eyes gouged out. Tazuru tells the police the creepy events that unfolded on the four previous nights: getting sent mysterious SD cards with disturbing videos on them, the door chime ringing with no reason, weird things on security camera, being visited by a weird old lady looking for her grandson, and a creepy ghost boy. Inspector Sawatari is initially incredulous, but then similar events start happening to him too.

title: Famous Last Words: Eric Dane
overview: In this emotional interview, the late actor and ALS advocate Eric Dane shared his final message for the world — knowing it would not air until his death.

title: Be Forever Yamato Rebel 3199 - Part 5: White Heat Galactic War
Be Forever Yamato - Rebel 3199 - Part 5: The Incandescent Galactic War
overview: Fifth part of the film version of the third Yamato remake show.

title: EVANGELION 30th Anniversary Special Screening
overview: A short film celebrating the 30th anniversary of Neon Genesis Evangelion starring both the classic and Rebuild iterations of Asuka. The short comedically explores alternate timelines.

title: TJPW Final Curtain in Kobe Art Center
overview: TJPW Final Curtain in Kobe Art Center was a professional wrestling event promoted by Tokyo Joshi Pro-Wrestling (TJPW). It was held on February 21, 2026 at Kobe Art Center in Kobe, Hyōgo, Japan.

title: Stardom in Osaka 2026 Feb.
overview: Stardom in Osaka 2026 Feb. was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on February 20, 2026 at EDION Arena Osaka No.2 in Osaka, Japan.

title: Hoshimachi Suisei Live “SuperNova: REBOOT”
overview: Hoshimachi Suisei Live “SuperNova: REBOOT" at K-Arena Yokohama

title: NJPW Presents CMLL Fantastica Mania 2026 - Day 2
overview: The second night of Fantastica Mania 2026 was a professional wrestling event co-produced by Japanese promotion New Japan Pro Wrestling (NJPW) and Mexican promotion Consejo Mundial De Lucha Libre (CMLL) that took place on February 21, 2026 at CHRES Gymnasium in Kochi, Japan.

title: "One Last Kiss” for EVA EXTRA 30
overview: The Central Tower, a video experience device that stands in the center of the exhibition tour area "EVA EXTRA 30," displays six large LED monitors, each measuring 6m high and 4m wide, in a honeycomb pattern. Interacting with over 700 LED bar lights placed throughout "EVA EXTRA 30," visitors can enjoy an experiential visualization that reconstructs Eva's visual memories.  Preparations are currently underway for a special performance, "One Last Kiss for EVA EXTRA 30," to be held alongside "One Last Kiss" (the theme song for the film "Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon a Time").

title: TJPW Love & Flame ~The Burning Venus Returns~
overview: TJPW Love & Flame ~The Burning Venus Returns~ was a professional wrestling event promoted by Tokyo Joshi Pro-Wrestling (TJPW). It was held on February 22, 2026 at Okayama Mirai Hall in Okayama, Japan.

title: Stardom in Kobe 2026 Feb.
overview: Stardom in Kobe 2026 Feb. was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on February 22, 2026 at Kobe Art Center in Kobe, Hyōgo, Japan.

title: DDT Hybrid Performer 2026 ~Kaisei Takechi 2nd Anniversary Show~
overview: Hybrid Performer 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by DDT Pro-Wrestling (DDT), commemorating the second anniversary of crossover star Kaisei Takechi's in-ring debut. It took place on February 22, 2026, at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan.

title: Opus
overview: A young writer is invited to the remote compound of a legendary pop star who mysteriously disappeared thirty years ago. Surrounded by the star's cult of sycophants and intoxicated journalists, she finds herself in the middle of his twisted plan.

title: Stardom in Okayama 2026 Feb.
overview: Stardom in Okayama 2026 Feb. was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on February 23, 2026 at Okayama Convention Center in Okayama, Japan.

title: AJPW Excite Series 2026 ~ Day 4
overview: Excite Series 2026 ~ Day 4 was a professional wrestling event promoted by All Japan Pro-Wrestling (AJPW). It was held on February 23, 2026 at Ota City General Gymnasium in Tokyo, Japan, and was main evented by Kento Miyahara defending the Triple Crown Heavyweight Championship against former champion, Jun Saito.

title: Marigold New Years Golden Garden 2026 ~ Day 12
overview: Marigold New Years Golden Garden 2026 ~ Day 12 was a professional wrestling event promoted by Dream Star★Fighting Marigold. It took place on February 23, 2026 at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan and served as the final show of the tour.

title: Continuance
overview: A serial killer, his eccentric wife, and their house-keeper want to hide from society before an impending economic collapse, but first they must go on one last supply run.

title: TIRESIAS
overview: After Jan recovers his vision through experimental back-alley surgery, he begins to uncover a reptilian conspiracy that may involve his doctor, Cleopatra.

title: Guilty, the AI Said
overview: A rookie judge testing a powerful AI verdict system finds herself at odds with the technology when it condemns a teenage patricide to death before the trial even begins.

title: NJPW Presents CMLL Fantastica Mania 2026 - Day 6
overview: The sixth night of Fantastica Mania 2026 was a professional wrestling event co-produced by Japanese promotion New Japan Pro Wrestling (NJPW) and Mexican promotion Consejo Mundial De Lucha Libre (CMLL) that took place on February 26, 2026 at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan.

title: "Wuthering Heights"
overview: Tragedy strikes when Heathcliff falls in love with Catherine Earnshaw, a woman from a wealthy family in 18th-century England.

title: In the Blink of an Eye
overview: Three storylines, spanning thousands of years, intersect and reflect on hope, connection, and the circle of life.

title: Accused
overview: When a celebrated queer doctor in London is accused of sexual misconduct, her life unravels. Now under a storm of suspicion and scrutiny, her marriage fractures and the truth blurs. Her wife must decide whether to walk away, or fight for the woman the world is turning against.

title: Rental Family
overview: An American actor in Tokyo struggles to find purpose until he lands an unusual gig: working for a Japanese 'rental family' agency, playing stand-in roles for strangers. As he immerses himself in his clients' worlds, he begins to form genuine bonds that blur the lines between performance and reality.

title: Doraemon the Movie: New Nobita and the Castle of the Undersea Devil
overview: Nobita and friends finds a secret underwater castle packed with mysteries and riches. With Doraemon's high-tech gadgets, they dive into an ocean adventure mixing humor, teamwork, and imagination in a breathtaking aquatic world.

title: Alienoid: Return to the Future
overview: Ean has a critical mission to return to the future to save everyone. However, she becomes trapped in the distant past while trying to prevent the escape of alien prisoners who are locked up in the bodies of humans. Meanwhile, Muruk, who helps Ean escape various predicaments, is unnerved when he begins sensing the presence of a strange being in his body. Traveling through the centuries, they are trying to prevent the explosion of the haava.

title: That Time I Got Reincarnated as a Slime the Movie: Tears of the Azure Sea
overview: After concluding the opening ceremony of the Demon Kingdom Federation Tempest, Rimuru and his companions are invited by the Celestial Emperor Hermesia of the great elven nation – the Magi Dynasty Salion – to visit her private resort island. As the group enjoys their brief vacation, a mysterious woman named Yura appears. A new incident unfolds against the backdrop of the boundless azure sea.

title: Lobby
overview: A CEO of a small tech company, Chang-wook, must win billions worth bid for National EV charger project against Gwang-woo, an ex-business partner who has thrived with lobbying after stealing Chang-wook's original technology. Discovering Gwang-woo's secret connection with the decision-maker Minister Cho, he plans his first-ever golf outing to win over the deal. Finally, the golf round day has come, but everything is not the way he planned. Scandal, betrayal and chase in this 18-hole round.

title: The Sparring Partner
overview: Adapted from a sensational real-life case in 2013, the intricate story begins when a young man partners with his friend to murder and dismember his parents. Pleading not guilty, the defense attorneys soon turn on each other, as the defendants play the devil and idiot game. Meanwhile, heated debates emerge inside the jury room, where nine jurors grapple with the truth.

title: The Disappearance of Josef Mengele
overview: In the aftermath of the Second World War, Josef Mengele, the Nazi doctor at Auschwitz, escapes to South America to rebuild his life in hiding. Through the eyes of his son who finds him again, Mengele is confronted with a past he can no longer ignore. From Buenos Aires to Paraguay via Brazil, the man who became known as “The Angel of Death” will organize his methodical disappearance to avoid any form of trial.

title: Samurai Vengeance
overview: In January 1810 in Edo, Kikunosuke, the 17-year-old-son of a murdered samurai, takes revenge on his father's murderer, Sakubai, who was his father's former retainer. Kikunosuke gloriously defeats the swaggering Sakubai in single combat in front of a theater, witnessed by a huge audience that had just finished watching a production of 47 Ronin. With Sakubai's severed head, Kikunosuke has achieved his revenge and ensured that his family won't be exiled. 18 months later, a ronin named Soichiro Kase from Kikunosuke's domain arrives at the theater. While he seems silly and smooth-talking, he's very keen on finding out more about the incident and Kikunosuke's time working at the theater. The theater's staff – the barker Ippachi, the swordsmanship teacher Sagara, the costumer Hotaru, the craftsman Kyuzo, and the playwright Kinji – are apprehensive and suspicious at his digging. However, not everything is as it seems.

title: #Spread
overview: Set in a small town, this film tells the story of a caregiver tormented by deep loss/doubt after his wife dies following her vaccination.

title: Coffee After All
overview: Cohaze Coffee has been a popular fixture of Tokyo’s trendy Shimokitazawa neighbourhood for 18 years but it will move to a new location in a month’s time. This has set the tongues wagging of the regular customers who sit and debate the situation while the madcap staff and lackadaisical manager go about their daily business as they count down the days. Watching all of this is Aoki, a young woman who spends her breaks sipping coffee solo, sometimes reading, sometimes watching the world go by through the window, and always observing how people from all walks of life end up in or around Kohaze coffee.

title: ENHYPEN [WALK THE LINE SUMMER EDITION] IN CINEMAS
overview: Experience ENHYPEN WORLD TOUR 'WALK THE LINE' IN JAPAN – SUMMER EDITION on the big screen! From their very first meeting to the global stage they command today, ENHYPEN's journey is one of growth, unity, and connection. Rising to million-seller status within a year, achieving a record-breaking Tokyo Dome debut, earning their first grand prize in 2025, and delivering a headline-making performance at Coachella, the group's success has been shaped by the powerful bond they share with ENGENEs. This concert film captures that bond in full: electrifying live performances, the intensity of rehearsals, candid moments behind the scenes, and the everyday lives of the members as they travel through Japan in the heat of summer. More than a concert, it is a celebration of connection, a line that continues to extend forward, carrying ENHYPEN and ENGENEs toward the future, together.

title: NJPW The New Beginning USA 2026
overview: The New Beginning USA 2026 was a professional wrestling pay-per-view promoted by New Japan Pro-Wrestling (NJPW) that took place on February 27, 2026, at the Cure Insurance Arena in Trenton, New Jersey, USA, and was headlined by Yota Tsuji (c) vs. Andrade El Idolo for the IWGP Global Heavyweight Championship.

title: Call Me Mother
overview: Twinkle is a single queer mother whose dream of officially adopting her son gets shaken when the boy's biological mother, Mara, unexpectedly reappears.

title: This Place
overview: An introspective journey of a Filipino daughter attending the funeral of her estranged OFW father in a city in Japan that is rebuilding from the aftermath of the March 2011 tsunami.

title: Kaneko Fumiko
overview: Why did she die? The Supreme Court first sentenced her to death, but then commuted her sentence to life imprisonment and sent her to Tochigi Women's Prison. What happened before she took her own life there? Based on her tanka poems, which convey her raw voice, the film explores her lone fight during the 121 days between her death sentence and suicide, a period that has remained obscure to date.

title: BanG Dream! 10th Anniversary LIVE「In the name of BanG Dream!」
overview: All 10 bands perform in a joint concert, held in commemoration of the franchise's 10th anniversary on February 28, 2026, at K Arena Yokohama.

title: City of Desire No.11: The Mechanism Behind Sexual Harassment Business Schemes
Stardom in Korakuen 2026 Feb.
overview: Stardom in Korakuen 2026 Feb. was a professional wrestling event promoted by World Wonder Ring Stardom, held on February 28, 2026 at Korakuen Hall in Tokyo, Japan. In the main event, Konami defended the Wonder of Stardom Championship against Hina.

title: In Search of a Mixed Identity
overview: The history of THNG Tek-chiong family not only reflects the confusion and the pursuit of Taiwanese identity over generations, but also serves as a cautionary tale for the people living in Taiwan.

title: Vivarium
overview: Ado's Vivarium short music film. This is an accompany to the book about Ado that is titled "Vivarium: Ado and I"

title: DDT Good Good! Yokohama Battle 2026
overview: DDT Good Good! Yokohama Battle 2026 was a professional wrestling event promoted by DDT Pro-Wrestling, which was held on February 28, 2026 at Yokohama Radiant Hall in Yokohama, Kanagawa, Japan. In the main event, Yuki Ishida challenged To-y for the DDT Extreme Championship in a Soccer vs Sumo! Mixed Martial Arts 'ITACHI' Rules match.

title: V.W.P 4th ONE-MAN LIVE 'Phenomenon IV -Reversal of Fate-'
